name: New Fortress Energy Inc.
description: New Fortress Energy Inc. is a global energy infrastructure company dedicated to addressing energy poverty and accelerating the world's transition to reliable, affordable, and cleaner energy. The company specializes in the development, ownership, and operation of integrated natural gas and liquefied natural gas (LNG) infrastructure, including terminals, power plants, and a fleet of specialized maritime vessels. By providing capital, expertise, and innovative solutions, New Fortress Energy aims to deliver energy to end-users worldwide, supporting industrial growth and community development while striving to make a positive and meaningful impact on the environment.
